name: godspeed
description: The godspeed methodology — a routing-and-orchestration pipeline for Claude Code. Fires on the word 'godspeed': scores the prompt on S0-S5 complexity, routes to the cheapest model that handles it well, dispatches parallel Sonnet workers for S3+ tasks, critic-gates the synthesis, and persists PASSing answers to a vector-embedded memory. Ships 18 skills — Homer pantheon (godspeed + zeus + oracle + mnemos + sybil + calliope/clio/urania) + research/review pipeline (holy-trinity + devTeam + profTeam + professor + blueprint + cycle) + session loop (init + close-session) + utilities (brain + verify). 3 slash commands (brain-score, godspeed-info, godspeed-settings). 5 lifecycle hooks. Full Python runtime + shared protocols/learnings/PDF contract. No project-specific folders — just the methodology, ready to fork and extend.
